title: evolvulus hasslerianus
intro: Evolvulus hasslerianus, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze or Brazilian Blue Eyes, is a flowering plant species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are believed to aid in treating various health issues. The plant is also said to provide several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and easing digestive problems. Evolvulus hasslerianus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
